_note: Initial draft answer keys. All keys will be refined after kappa calibration (QUALITY-02) and client sign-off (Phase 6). Version bumps on every edit.

videos.rationale: Visible trademark/logo infringement (1.4) and stripped watermark (1.6) — Copyright & IP violation. Promotes a fraudulent investment scheme (8.3) — financial scam under Spam & Manipulation.
Benign content — generic lifestyle montage with no policy-violating elements. No hate speech, no copyright issues, no regulated goods, no explicit content, no misinformation.
Contains racial slurs (2.2) and explicit calls to violence against a specific group (3.4). Hate speech + incitement to violence.
Makes false medical claims that a household product cures a serious illness (7.1). Health misinformation with clear harm potential.

Deliberately ambiguous brand-adjacent case. Music video uses imagery stylistically similar to a recognized extremist symbol (9.6). Falls under Brand Safety (GARM) adjacency. **PENDING client decision O-01**: strict brand-safe interpretation = DECLINE; community-guideline-only = APPROVE. Current draft uses DECLINE per preliminary rubric. Will be finalized after client sign-off.
